narrative:
Valleyview-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 455 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.5 percentage points.
